# 🐛 Before Reporting a Bug

**Please check the following before posting:**

## ✅ Checklist

1. **Search existing issues first**
   - 🔍 Check [Issues](https://github.com/mewset/better-iptv/issues) to see if this bug is already reported
   - If you find a matching issue, comment there instead of creating a new discussion

2. **Is this really a bug?**
   - **Bug**: Something that should work but doesn't (crashes, errors, incorrect behavior)
   - **Question**: How to use a feature → Use [Q&A category](https://github.com/mewset/better-iptv/discussions/categories/q-a)
   - **Feature Request**: Something that doesn't exist yet → Use [Ideas category](https://github.com/mewset/better-iptv/discussions/categories/ideas)

3. **Create a proper bug report**
   - If no existing issue matches → [Create a Bug Report Issue](https://github.com/mewset/better-iptv/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
   - Use the structured bug report template for faster resolution

## 💡 When to Use This Category

Use **Bugs** discussion category for:
- 🤔 **Uncertain if it's a bug** - Discuss to verify before creating an issue
- 🔍 **Need help reproducing** - Get help from community to confirm the bug
- 💬 **General bug discussion** - Talk about known bugs and workarounds

## ⚡ For Confirmed Bugs

Once you've confirmed it's a real bug:
1. Search issues again to avoid duplicates
2. Create a structured bug report: [New Bug Report](https://github.com/mewset/better-iptv/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
3. Include all requested information (OS, version, logs, steps to reproduce)

---

**Thank you for helping improve Better IPTV! 🙏**
